DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/containers.description: Delete a registry from the account, this will make Cloudchamber unable to pull images from the registry

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

domain.description: A string representation of a domain name. See RFC-1034 (https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc1034.txt). Consider that the limit of a domain name is min 3 and max 253 ASCII characters.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

403.description: The image registry cannot be deleted

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

404.description: The image registry does not exist

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

409.description: The image registry cannot be deleted because it is still referenced by applications on the account

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

DELETE /accounts/{account_id}/containers.summary: Delete a registry from the account

GET /accounts/{account_id}/containers/re.description: Get the list of configured registries in the account

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

items.description: An image registry added in a customer account

created_at.description: UTC timestamp string in ISO 8601 format

domain.description: A string representation of a domain name. See RFC-1034 (https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc1034.txt). Consider that the limit of a domain name is min 3 and max 253 ASCII characters.

kind.description: The type of registry that is being configured.

oneOf.description: The type of external registry that is being configured.

private_credential.description: A reference to a secret stored in Secrets Store

secret_name.description: Name of the secret being referenced

store_id.description: Store ID where the secret is stored

public_key.description: A base64 representation of the public key that you can set to configure the registry. If null, the registry is public and doesn't have authentication setup with Cloudchamber

200.description: The list of registries that are added in the account

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

GET /accounts/{account_id}/containers/re.summary: Get the list of configured registries in the account

POST /accounts/{account_id}/containers/r.description: Add a new image registry into your account, so then Cloudflare can pull docker images with public key JWT authentication

schema.description: Request body for creating a new image registry configuration

auth.description: Credentials needed to authenticate with an external image registry.

oneOf.description: A reference to a secret stored in Secrets Store

secret_name.description: Name of the secret being referenced

store_id.description: Store ID where the secret is stored

public_credential.description: The format of this value is determined by the registry being configured.

domain.description: A string representation of a domain name. See RFC-1034 (https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc1034.txt). Consider that the limit of a domain name is min 3 and max 253 ASCII characters.

is_public.description: If you own the registry and is private, this should be false or not defined. If it's a public registry like docker.io, you should set this to true

kind.description: The type of external registry that is being configured.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

result.description: An image registry added in a customer account

created_at.description: UTC timestamp string in ISO 8601 format

domain.description: A string representation of a domain name. See RFC-1034 (https://www.ietf.org/rfc/rfc1034.txt). Consider that the limit of a domain name is min 3 and max 253 ASCII characters.

kind.description: The type of registry that is being configured.

oneOf.description: The type of external registry that is being configured.

private_credential.description: A reference to a secret stored in Secrets Store

secret_name.description: Name of the secret being referenced

store_id.description: Store ID where the secret is stored

public_key.description: A base64 representation of the public key that you can set to configure the registry. If null, the registry is public and doesn't have authentication setup with Cloudchamber

201.description: Created a new image registry in the account

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

400.description: Image registry input is malformed, see the error details

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

403.description: The registry that is being added is not allowed

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

409.description: The image registry already exists in the account

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/containers/r.summary: Add a new image registry configuration

POST /accounts/{account_id}/containers/r.description: Generates temporary credentials for accessing Cloudflare's container image registry. Used for pulling and pushing container images.

schema.description: The domain to get credentials for.
Specifies the configuration for the image registry credential to create.

expiration_minutes.description: The minimum number of minutes the token will be valid for. Must be positive. We make a best effort to respect this value, but some registry providers do not let us configure the token lifetime, so the token may be valid for longer.

items.description: Specifies what permissions the credentials will have.

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

result.description: Credentials that can be used to interact with the requested image registry.

account_id.description: A unique identifier for the user's account

password.description: The password to use when authenticating to the image registry.

registry_host.description: The domain of the image registry the credentials are for.

username.description: The username to use when authenticating to the image registry.

201.description: Credentials with 'pull' or 'push' permissions to access the registry

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.
Whether the API call was successful.

403.description: The requested token permissions are not allowed for this account

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

404.description: The image registry does not exist

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

409.description: The registry was configured as public, so credentials can not be generated

success.description: Whether the API call was successful.

POST /accounts/{account_id}/containers/r.summary: Generate a JWT to interact with the specified image registry.
